race.comment: DOLLY (9) wasn't beaten far here fresh in good company, then was a flat second-up when thrown in the deep end. Expect her to be sharper with the blinkers going on, and the inside draw only helps her chances. Drops back to a a sprint of a month in-between and rates a leading chance. DITTERICH (5) is rarely far away and again shapes as one of the main chances with McDougall booked. PRETTY PENGUIN (4) closed off well late last start and is sure to appreciate the drop back in grade with the added aid of the claim. HULM (1) another one who should be respected back in this grade.
